titles.en: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Sahl Ibn Al-yasa'
Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Sahl Ibn Al-yasa'

segments: ه عن سهل بن اليسع فقد رويته عن أحمد بن زياد بن جعفر الهمدانيّ- رضي اللّه عنه- عن عليّ بن إبراهيم، عن أبيه، عن سهل بن اليسع‌.
arabic.text: ه عن سهل بن اليسع فقد رويته عن أحمد بن زياد بن جعفر الهمدانيّ- رضي اللّه عنه- عن عليّ بن إبراهيم، عن أبيه، عن سهل بن اليسع‌.

segments: Everything in this book that is narrated from Sahl ibn Al-Yasa' has been transmitted by me from Ahmad ibn Ziyad ibn Ja'far Al-Hamadani - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Ali ibn Ibrahim, from his father, from Sahl ibn Al-Yasa'.
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text: Everything in this book that is narrated from Sahl ibn Al-Yasa' has been transmitted by me from Ahmad ibn Ziyad ibn Ja'far Al-Hamadani - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Ali ibn Ibrahim, from his father, from Sahl ibn Al-Yasa'.
